phrases.intent_en: Ask where the box office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para comprar entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOH-deh es-TA la ta-KEE-ya pa-ra kom-PRAR en-TRA-das?

likely_response.local: Buenos días, al fondo a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the back on the left.

responses.english: Good morning, at the back on the left.
responses.phonetic: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Buenos días, al fondo a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the will-call desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde recojo las entradas reservadas online?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh reh-KOH-hoh lahs en-TRAH-dahs reh-sehr-VAH-dahs ohn-LAHYN?

likely_response.local: Buenos días, en la misma taquilla principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs EHN LAH MEE-smah tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the same main box office.

responses.english: Good morning, at the same main box office.
responses.phonetic: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs EHN LAH MEE-smah tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Buenos días, en la misma taquilla principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main auditorium entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cuál es la entrada para la sala?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KWAH-leh EHSS lah en-TRAH-dah PAH-rah lah SAH-lah?

likely_response.local: Buenos días, puerta número uno, al centro.
likely_response.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs poo-EHR-tah NÚ-meh-roh OO-noh AHL THEHNT-roh
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, door number one, in the center.

responses.english: Good morning, door number one, in the center.
responses.phonetic: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs poo-EHR-tah NÚ-meh-roh OO-noh AHL THEHNT-roh
responses.french: Buenos días, puerta número uno, al centro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are tickets left for tonight's show
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿quedan entradas para la función de hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KEH-dahn en-TRAH-dahs PAH-rah lah foon-SYOHN deh OY?

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is indicated there.

responses.english: Good morning, it is indicated there.
